characters.state_notes: Fire-aftermath dirt and tension only; face, body, hairstyle, bow, route pack, herb-green layer, and left-shoulder injury inherit the series master.
Tense flight posture only; red-thread hair, mist-purple/cold-grey robe, upright ritual posture, and restrained noble silhouette inherit the series master.
Do not depict as a living present figure; inherit through herb-ash marks and healer memory at the well wall.
Background pursuer only; preserve hybrid slave-soldier tier and do not turn into pure insect soldier, official, or Bai Yi.
